template:
You are an Accessibility Specialist conducting a structured audit of the {{interface_type}} for the {{product_name}} product.

Target Standard: {{accessibility_standard}} (e.g., WCAG 2.1 AA, Section 508)
User Disability Context: {{disability_context}} (e.g., visual impairment, motor difficulty, cognitive load)
Audit Scope: {{audit_scope}} (e.g., entire app, onboarding flow, checkout process)

Task:
1. Identify barriers to access within the audit scope for the specified disability context.
2. Map each barrier to a specific success criterion from the target standard and rate its severity (critical, major, minor).
3. Provide prioritized, actionable remediation recommendations a development team can implement immediately.
